x.caption: RoboCo v0.19.0 is live. Pluggable sandboxes, a native video engine, the Ponytail build-laziness doctrine, and a closed cloud-auth spoof. See the full notes: roboco.tech #RoboCo #AIEngineering

tiktok.caption:
RoboCo v0.19.0 is here. We shipped pluggable sandboxes for postgres, redis, and mongo; a native video engine with CEO-approved posting to X and TikTok; Ponytail, the build-laziness doctrine now guiding the whole fleet; and a fix for the agent-token 401 class that closed a cloud-auth header-spoof path. Read the full release notes at roboco.tech.

#RoboCo #AIEngineering #ReleaseNotes #v019 #OpenSource #AGPL
